title: prunus × lannesiana f. donarium
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. donarium, also known as Japanese apricot or Japanese plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and infections, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. donarium include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against chronic diseases and promote overall well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
